elvis_intro_01.speaker: Elvis
elvis_intro_01.text: Elvis: You’ve been quiet. Been avoiding everyone?

elvis_intro_02.speaker: Tom
elvis_intro_02.text: Tom: Yeah… just working, trying to get by.

elvis_intro_05.speaker: Elvis
elvis_intro_05.text: Elvis: I know brother. I’m sorry.

elvis_intro_06.speaker: Tom
elvis_intro_06.text: Tom: He left me a last wish.

elvis_intro_08.speaker: Tom
elvis_intro_08.text: Tom: A flower. A real flower. He wanted me to get one and give it to a women named Chelsea.

elvis_intro_09.speaker: Elvis
elvis_intro_09.text: Elvis: A flower? How are you supposed to get that? And who's Chelsea???

elvis_intro_10.speaker: Tom
elvis_intro_10.text: Tom: I don’t know neither. But I have to try, I owed him a lot, you know it.

elvis_intro_11.speaker: Elvis
elvis_intro_11.text: Elvis: Wait... I might know a place. There's a black market in the hood, they sell everything.

elvis_intro_12.speaker: Tom
elvis_intro_12.text: Tom: Black market... Where is it? You've been there?

elvis_intro_13.speaker: Elvis
elvis_intro_13.text: Elvis: No. I just heard of it in the bar. But I am sure it exists.

elvis_intro_14.speaker: Tom
elvis_intro_14.text: Tom: Then I'll go for it.
